text:
Harborline Marine — Leadership

Our executive team keeps cargo moving across forty EMEA ports.

Elin Marsh — Chief People Officer
Elin joined Harborline in 2024 and leads people strategy across nine countries. She spoke at the Nordic HR Summit in May about scaling multilingual onboarding.

Viktor Sandell, Chief Financial Officer
Viktor oversees finance and vendor operations, including the current review of our payroll and benefits stack.

Priya Raman - IT Director
Priya owns core systems and integrations across the fleet-operations platform.

Jonas Wiik — Principal Naval Architect
Jonas designs our next-generation harbor tugs.

Press and partnership questions: elin.marsh@harborlinemarine.com or info@harborlinemarine.com. Finance vendor inquiries: viktor.sandell@harborlinemarine.com.
Harborline Marine partners with TriNet for payroll and benefits administration.

Careers at Harborline Marine

We are hiring across operations, engineering, and people teams — 28 open roles this quarter, including HR Business Partners in Rotterdam and Gdansk. Our people team is growing to support expansion into two new Mediterranean ports in 2026.
